name: Sysinternals Tools Usage
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: Sysinternals tool EULA acceptance records — each Sysinternals tool (PsExec, Process Monitor, Autoruns, etc.) creates a subkey here when the EULA is accepted.
forensic_value: Proves which Sysinternals tools were accepted/run on this system — PsExec EULA acceptance is a particularly strong indicator of lateral movement tool usage. Individual subkeys per tool with AcceptedEula=1.
